nasb.text: When the officers have finished speaking to the people, they shall appoint commanders of armies at the head of the people.

esv.text: And when the officers have finished speaking to the people, then commanders shall be appointed at the head of the people.

cnv.text: 官長對人民講完了話，就要指派軍官統率他們。

ccb.text: 他们讲完后，就要委派将领率军出战。
